creator: asami@cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* +diff -ur plor-0.3.1/configure plor-mod/configure
 * +--- plor-0.3.1/configure	Sat Apr 26 13:11:10 1997
 * ++++ configure	Wed Jul  2 15:51:07 1997
 :
<700 lines of diff to "configure" deleted>
 :
 * + EOF

This looks like a classic example of a port wanting to depend on the
devel/autoconf port.

Satoshi
